name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Chestnut?=
subject: See You Tomorrow!
body:
Peter,

Join us as we kick off our Heart of Missouri inaugural statewide tour tomorrow! We're traveling across the state to celebrate the inauguration of Eric as the 56th governor of Missouri, and to thank our team for your commitment and support.

We also wanted to let you know there was a small printing issue and invites have been delayed. Please know that if you requested an invitation online, you will receive your invite within the next few days.
_**January 3rd**_

**KIRKSVILLE THANK YOU TOUR STOP
10:00 AM**
Truman State University Student Union
The HUB
100 E Normal Street
Kirksville, MO 63501
[Click to RSVP](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=20a4bb2e8c&e=84041254e6)

**ST. JOSEPH THANK YOU TOUR STOP
1:30 PM**
Missouri Western University
Hall of Fame Room
Spratt Stadium
4525 Downs Drive
St. Joseph, MO 64507
[Click to RSVP](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e66ac1c766&e=84041254e6)

**LEE 'S SUMMIT THANK YOU TOUR STOP
7:00 PM**
Garozzo's Ristorante
1547 NE Rice Rd
Lee's Summit, MO 64086
[Click to RSVP](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=568e65f815&e=84041254e6)

_**January 5th**_

**HANNIBAL THANK YOU TOUR STOP
11:30 AM**
Mark Twain Museum
120 N Main Street
Hannibal, MO 63401
[Click to RSVP](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=d7b6f0b0ee&e=84041254e6)

**CAPE GIRARDEAU THANK YOU TOUR STOP
6:00 PM**
Marquette Tower
339 Broadway
Cape Girardeau, MO 63701
[Click to RSVP](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=23301bd597&e=84041254e6)

_**January 6th**_

**JOPLIN THANK YOU TOUR STOP
2:00 PM**
Freeman Hospital West
1102 West 32nd Street
Joplin, MO 64804
[Click to RSVP](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=bf02188016&e=84041254e6)

**SPRINGFIELD THANK YOU TOUR STOP
5:30 PM**
Missouri State University Welcome Center
901 South National Avenue
Springfield, MO 65897
[Click to RSVP](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=d6c947db1d&e=84041254e6)

_**January 7th**_

**ST. LOUIS THANK YOU TOUR STOP
2:00 PM**
RBO PrintLogistix
2463 Schuetz Road
Maryland Heights, MO 63043
[Click to RSVP](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=c00f6ab45e&e=84041254e6)

_Please call [573-283-3950](tel:\(573\)%20283-3950) and check [newmissouri.org](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=0f8ace568f&e=84041254e6) for updated information, FAQs, and to RSVP._

We look forward to seeing you!

Cheers,

Catherine Chestnut
Greitens Inaugural
Executive Director
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=9f6fdbac55&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e7d2a2de17&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=047d2748d8), but please let us know how we can improve.

body:
Introducing the Inaugural Collection -- a special line of merchandise. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba3EoBAGWYuCHfWgaBH2jDRMN6aaaaBH2jBMGXONaa?k=A@u-yFt&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=m&n=&1=q~qBrE0sdkkqk1Qv0zYxjIiojIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o0~&jIj)

Friend,

With Inauguration Day just weeks away, we're launching an Inaugural Collection of special-edition merchandise to commemorate this historic day in American history.

First among the Inaugural Collection is a set of two Made-in-America 16-ounce pint glasses decorated with a special seal honoring the 45th president.

[**Get your Official Inauguration Pint Glass Set now to celebrate the swearing in of President-Elect Trump.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba3EoBAGWYuCHfWgaBH2jDRMN6aaaaBH2jBMGXONaa?k=A@u-yFt&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=n&n=&1=q~qBrE0sdkkqk1Qv0zYxjIiojIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o0~&jIj)

Cheers to America's next president in your very own Official Inauguration Pint Glass.

[**Get your Official Inauguration Pint Glass Set just in time for January 20.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba3EoBAGWYuCHfWgaBH2jDRMN6aaaaBH2jBMGXONaa?k=A@u-yFt&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=p&n=&1=q~qBrE0sdkkqk1Qv0zYxjIiojIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o0~&jIj)

Alex
Trump Store Manager

**[Get Your Pint Glass Set](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eckba3EoBAGWYuCHfWgaBH2jDRMN6aaaaBH2jBMGXONaa?k=A@u-yFt&o=TzmsbvY2wF_WwQsb.mew&b=q&n=&1=q~qBrE0sdkkqk1Qv0zYxjIiojIYxXIZpSIjIjIXp0o0~&jIj)**

name: Democrats.org
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Stop Republican corruption in Congress
body:
The GOP held a secret vote to dismantle the Office of Congressional Ethics
---
**The GOP's first order of business this year: dismantling the Office of Congressional Ethics. Add your name right now to tell House Republicans you won't stand for corruption.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c15b/4067b0a/237cc9c64/7e792b95/522624744/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Congressional-Ethics1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170103_ew2_nd2&source=em_20170103_ew2_nd2")**
Friend --

Late last night, House Republicans held a secret vote to effectively eliminate the Office of Congressional Ethics -- hours before the new Republican-led Congress is sworn in.

The Office of Congressional Ethics was created as an independent body to investigate congressional corruption in the aftermath of an illegal lobbying scandal that ended with three members of Congress being sent to jail.

Now, instead of being independent, the office will report to a GOP-controlled House committee. It won't be able to accept anonymous tips or report any information to the public. Just to drive home the point, Republicans even stripped the word "ethics" from the office's name. And these last-minute changes were orchestrated by a group of Republicans, several of whom have been the targets of ethics investigations.

**Republicans need to know we're not going to let their corruption run rampant through Congress. Add your name right now to call on the GOP to restore the Office of Congressional Ethics -- and let them know that if they won't hold themselves accountable, we will:**

**[ADD MY NAME](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c15b/4067b0a/237cc9c64/7e792b92/522624744/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Congressional-Ethics1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+MY+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170103_ew2_nd2&source=em_20170103_ew2_nd2")**
Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c15b/4067b0a/237cc9c64/7e792b93/522624744/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170103_ew2_nd2&source=em_20170103_ew2_nd2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c15b/4067b0a/237cc9c64/7e792b90/522624744/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170103_ew2_nd2&source=em_20170103_ew2_nd2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c15b/4067b0a/237cc9c64/7e792b91/522624744/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170103_ew2_nd2&source=em_20170103_ew2_nd2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c15b/4067b0a/237cc9c64/7e792b9e/522624744/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170103_ew2_nd2&source=em_20170103_ew2_nd2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: VICTORY (for now) against Republican corruption in Congress
body:
The GOP held a secret vote to dismantle the Office of Congressional Ethics
---
Big news:

Republicans tried to sneak through a major dismantling of congressional ethics oversight late last night.

**But Democratic leaders and thousands of grassroots supporters spoke out, and the GOP is backing off -- for now.**

This doesn't change the fact that House Republicans' very first action in 2017 was an attempt to make it easier to get away with corruption. And they've already indicated that they'll try to implement these changes again, when they hope fewer people like us will be paying attention.

We're counting on you to help us keep the pressure on. Can you pitch in $3 or more right now so we have the resources we need to stop the GOP?

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

**[QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c154/4067b0a/237b4acaf/7e791202/1873128190/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170103_dnc_nd&source=em_20170103_dnc_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c154/4067b0a/237b4acaf/7e791203/1873128190/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170103_dnc_nd&source=em_20170103_dnc_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c154/4067b0a/237b4acaf/7e791200/1873128190/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170103_dnc_nd&source=em_20170103_dnc_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c154/4067b0a/237b4acaf/7e791201/1873128190/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170103_dnc_nd&source=em_20170103_dnc_nd")**

**[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c154/4067b0a/237b4acaf/7e79120e/1873128190/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170103_dnc_nd&source=em_20170103_dnc_nd")**

**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c154/4067b0a/237b4acaf/7e79120f/1873128190/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+httpsmydemocratsorgHelpDemocratsFightBac&utm_campaign=em_20170103_dnc_nd&source=em_20170103_dnc_nd")**

** Thanks,

The Democrats

\-------- Forwarded message -------
Sender: Democrats.org
Sent: Tue, Jan 3, 2017
Subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Stop Republican corruption in Congress

**The GOP's first order of business this year: dismantling the Office of Congressional Ethics. Add your name right now to tell House Republicans you won't stand for corruption.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c154/4067b0a/237b4acaf/7e79120c/1873128190/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Congressional-Ethics1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170103_dnc_nd&source=em_20170103_dnc_nd")**
Friend --

Late last night, House Republicans held a secret vote to effectively eliminate the Office of Congressional Ethics -- hours before the new Republican-led Congress is sworn in.

The Office of Congressional Ethics was created as an independent body to investigate congressional corruption in the aftermath of an illegal lobbying scandal that ended with three members of Congress being sent to jail.

Now, instead of being independent, the office will report to a GOP-controlled House committee. It won't be able to accept anonymous tips or report any information to the public. Just to drive home the point, Republicans even stripped the word "ethics" from the office's name. And these last-minute changes were orchestrated by a group of Republicans, several of whom have been the targets of ethics investigations.

**Republicans need to know we're not going to let their corruption run rampant through Congress. Add your name right now to call on the GOP to restore the Office of Congressional Ethics -- and let them know that if they won't hold themselves accountable, we will:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/Congressional-Ethics](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c154/4067b0a/237b4acaf/7e79120d/1873128190/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Congressional-Ethics1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+httpsmydemocratsorgCongressionalEthics&utm_campaign=em_20170103_dnc_nd&source=em_20170103_dnc_nd")**

Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c154/4067b0a/237b4acaf/7e79120b/1873128190/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170103_dnc_nd&source=em_20170103_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c154/4067b0a/237b4acaf/7e791208/1873128190/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170103_dnc_nd&source=em_20170103_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c154/4067b0a/237b4acaf/7e791209/1873128190/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170103_dnc_nd&source=em_20170103_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

"" "" "" "" "" Or donate another amount: "" Thanks, The Democrats \-------- Forwarded message ------- Sender: Democrats.org Sent: Tue, Jan 3, 2017 Subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Stop Republican corruption in Congress The GOP's first order of business this year: dismantling the Office of Congressional Ethics. Add your name right now to tell House Republicans you won't stand for corruption. "" Friend -- Late last night, House Republicans held a secret vote to effectively eliminate the Office of Congressional Ethics -- hours before the new Republican-led Congress is sworn in. The Office of Congressional Ethics was created as an independent body to investigate congressional corruption in the aftermath of an illegal lobbying scandal that ended with three members of Congress being sent to jail. Now, instead of being independent, the office will report to a GOP-controlled House committee. It won't be able to accept anonymous tips or report any information to the public. Just to drive home the point, Republicans even stripped the word "ethics" from the office's name. And these last-minute changes were orchestrated by a group of Republicans, several of whom have been the targets of ethics investigations. Republicans need to know we're not going to let their corruption run rampant through Congress. Add your name right now to call on the GOP to restore the Office of Congressional Ethics -- and let them know that if they won't hold themselves accountable, we will: "" Thanks, Eric Eric Walker Deputy Communications Director Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Team Maggie
subject: 🎉 Today's the day (sign the card) 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3e/2a380d31/143be212/fec533/1190315705/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3e/2a380d31/143be212/fec533/1190315705/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
This is it --
Today's the day we all worked so hard for. Maggie Hassan will take the oath of office and officially become the newest United States Senator from New Hampshire!
**We're putting together a card to congratulate Maggie and welcome her to the Senate, and it would mean the world to her to see your name on it.** [**Will you add your name, please?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3e/2a380d31/143be212/fec53c/1190315705/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170103_swearingin?&source=e20170103_swearingin")
You don't have to look far to know that Maggie will make a great Senator:
As Governor of New Hampshire, Maggie stood with Planned Parenthood to protect a woman's right to safely and affordably access health care.
Under Maggie's leadership, New Hampshire froze in-state college tuition to help make it easier for Granite Staters to get the education they need to thrive.
And, Maggie supported a market-based program in the Northeast that limits greenhouse gas emissions and encourages innovations in clean energy.
[**If you're excited to see Maggie fight for common-sense solutions like these in Washington, sign the card to let her know that you're with her.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3e/2a380d31/143be212/fec53c/1190315705/VEsC/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170103_swearingin?&source=e20170103_swearingin")
Thanks for being on Team Maggie and for everything you did to make this day happen.
Maggie for NH

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3e/2a380d31/143be212/fec53e/1190315705/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzAxMDNfc3dlYXJpbmdpbiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwMTAzX3N3ZWFyaW5naW5fYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/20170103_swearingin?refcode=e20170103_swearingin_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3e/2a380d31/143be212/fec53f/1190315705/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

**

**

subject: Inauguration Pint Glasses are here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Introducing the Inaugural Collection -- a special line of merchandise. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba3HbQGPTlCHfWgaX3mDRMN6aaaaBP1yBMGYOGwa?m=9@uAx-w&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=k&p=&z=s9s~tC2qfimomzSt2xavlGkmlGuGavZGbnUGlGlGZn2m29&lGl)

Friend,

With Inauguration Day just weeks away, we're launching an Inaugural Collection of special-edition merchandise to commemorate this historic day in American history.

First among the Inaugural Collection is a set of two Made-in-America 16-ounce pint glasses decorated with a special seal honoring the 45th president.

[**Get your Official Inauguration Pint Glass Set now to celebrate the swearing in of President-Elect Trump.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba3HbQGPTlCHfWgaX3mDRMN6aaaaBP1yBMGYOGwa?m=9@uAx-w&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=l&p=&z=s9s~tC2qfimomzSt2xavlGkmlGuGavZGbnUGlGlGZn2m29&lGl)
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba3HbQGPTlCHfWgaX3mDRMN6aaaaBP1yBMGYOGwa?m=9@uAx-w&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=m&p=&z=s9s~tC2qfimomzSt2xavlGkmlGuGavZGbnUGlGlGZn2m29&lGl)

Cheers to America's next president in your very own Official Inauguration Pint Glass.

[**Get your Official Inauguration Pint Glass Set just in time for January 20.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba3HbQGPTlCHfWgaX3mDRMN6aaaaBP1yBMGYOGwa?m=9@uAx-w&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=n&p=&z=s9s~tC2qfimomzSt2xavlGkmlGuGavZGbnUGlGlGZn2m29&lGl)

Alex
Trump Store Manager

**[Get Your Pint Glass Set](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba3HbQGPTlCHfWgaX3mDRMN6aaaaBP1yBMGYOGwa?m=9@uAx-w&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=o&p=&z=s9s~tC2qfimomzSt2xavlGkmlGuGavZGbnUGlGlGZn2m29&lGl)**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Where Democrats stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Our real work begins with the start of a new Congress. We're in for the fight of our lives and we need your help today... [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170103-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend,

It's swearing-in day for the United States Senate - and I want to be clear about where Senate Democrats stand.

**We 're going to fight our hearts out for the working families who sent us here - and also the ones who didn't. **

The American people have every right to be alarmed about Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's agenda. Republicans have made no secret of their plans to dismantle the Affordable Care Act and end Medicare as we know it, and that's just the beginning.

Senate Democrats are on the frontlines against this radical right-wing agenda for the rich and powerful. [**We will be fighting as hard as we can to stop them, but we can 't do it alone, Friend. Will you pitch in today to help the DSCC support us in the coming fights?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170103-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

2016 was a tough year for many of us. But we cannot forget that a majority of Americans voted against Donald Trump, and Democrats took seats away from Republicans in the House and Senate.

Catherine Cortez Masto, Tammy Duckworth, Kamala Harris, Maggie Hassan, and Chris Van Hollen are all smart, strong fighters - and they're ready to get to work right now, on Day One.

**So what does that mean for 2017 and beyond?**

It means protecting and building on President Obama and the Democrats' record of success. It means fighting for equality and a level playing field for all. It means opposing any action by Donald Trump or Republicans in Congress that threatens the most vulnerable Americans. And it means ramping up Senate campaigns now to take back the majority in 2018.

**We 've got work to do, Friend. Please pitch in today so the DSCC can help Senate Democrats take on Donald Trump and the Republicans.**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170103-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170103-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170103-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170103-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170103-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170103-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Together, we will take on the bigotry that fueled Trump's campaign. We will stand firm against every effort by Republicans to weaken Medicare and Social Security. We will work to build an economy that works for everyone, not just those at the top.

But to do that, we must be committed from the very beginning. [**Are you with us?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170103-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed05/2b07114c/41f716d3/73681ac0/1847906204/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed05/2b07114c/41f716d3/73681ac3/1847906204/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed05/2b07114c/41f716d3/73681ac2/1847906204/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: Supplies for the Women's March >>
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c700d/24c69fd9/fefee103/18eef99c/3960656434/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all&source=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all")
---

Peter,

We're just a few weeks out from the Women's March on Washington and sister marches in cities across the country.

Are you ready?

As you're getting your plans in order, make sure you send a strong message once you get there.

The EMILY's List Store has all your needs covered: rally signs to wave, knit hats to stay warm, and buttons to wear or pass out. I want to make sure you get your gear early enough to have it in time for the march.

**[Order your Women's March gear in the EMILY's List Store today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c700d/24c69fd9/fefee103/18eef99d/3960656434/VEsE/ "http://store.emilyslist.org/collections/rally-merch?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Order+your+Womens+March+gear+in+the+EMIL&utm_campaign=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all&source=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c700d/24c69fd9/fefee103/18eef99e/3960656434/VEsF/ "http://store.emilyslist.org/collections/rally-merch?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all&source=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all")
We're proud to be standing alongside so many feminists to raise our voices and show that women will continue to be heard.

And with hundreds of thousands of women and men expected to turn out in marches across the country on January 21st, we will be a force that can't be ignored.

Make sure you're part of the EMILY's List crew on the ground, and that you get all your march gear in time.

**Shop our Women's March collection now:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Get-Your-Rally-Gear](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c700d/24c69fd9/fefee103/18eef99f/3960656434/VEsC/ "http://store.emilyslist.org/collections/rally-merch?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgGetYourRallyGear&utm_campaign=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all&source=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c700d/24c69fd9/fefee103/18eef998/3960656434/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all&source=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c700d/24c69fd9/fefee103/18eef999/3960656434/VEsA/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all&source=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c700d/24c69fd9/fefee103/18eef99a/3960656434/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all&source=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c700d/24c69fd9/fefee103/18eef99b/3960656434/VEsO/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all&source=WQEFE101N_digital_email_20170103_JOCmarch_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
